## Theme Name
<!-- Display name of your theme -->

## Theme Repository
<!-- Link to your event-game-theme-* repository -->

## Theme Identifier
<!-- Lowercase, hyphens only — e.g. cyberpunk, ocean-dark, neon-city -->

## Preview
<!-- Attach a screenshot of the theme in action -->

## Compatibility
<!-- Minimum framework version this theme is compatible with — e.g. v1.0.0 -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Forked from event-game-theme-template
- [ ] All required CSS variables defined
- [ ] Dark mode variant included
- [ ] manifest.json complete
- [ ] preview.png included
- [ ] README.md describes the theme
- [ ] Theme repository is public
